summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Finance Dashboard system. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend has critical mixed content security issue preventing data loading.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content Security Error - Frontend making HTTP requests to HTTPS endpoints
integration_issues.details: Console shows: 'Mixed Content: The page at 'https://...' was loaded over HTTPS, but requested an insecure XMLHttpRequest endpoint 'http://...'. Environment variable REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is correctly set to HTTPS, but axios is somehow making HTTP requests.

passed_tests: Dashboard summary data (Total Income: $34,550, Total Expenses: $13,906, Net Balance: $20,644)
Dashboard charts and recent transactions display
Navigation role restrictions (Admin: all pages, Analyst: Dashboard+Records, Viewer: Dashboard only)
Login page renders with demo credentials
Add Record dialog opens and form validation
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix mixed content security issue in frontend. Despite REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL being correctly set to HTTPS, axios is making HTTP requests. This prevents Records and Users pages from loading data. Investigate axios configuration in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js and ensure all API calls use HTTPS protocol.

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (UI loads correctly, auth works, but data loading fails due to mixed content)
